---
title: time-date
description: "Detect suspicious time.Date arguments."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect suspicious time.Date arguments. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
time.Date(2026, 13, 16, 12, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
```

## Good

```go
time.Date(2026, time.July, 16, 12, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC)
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only time-date`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
